title: 5-Scenario Probabilistic Framework — US
description: Schema for the 5-scenario block (strong_bear / bear / base / bull / strong_bull) with weights summing to 1.00 ± 0.01. Each scenario has its own EPS path AND its own multiple AND its own narrative bridge. EPS × multiple = target_price must verify within rounding. Ported from china-equity-ic-rigor (强空/空头/基础/多头/强多), English-localized, with US-specific sector branching for multiple type.

scenario_id.description: Five required scenarios. Order convention: strong_bear (P10 tail) → strong_bull (P90 tail). Maps to China 强空/空头/基础/多头/强多.

multiple_type.description: Per-sector valuation primary multiple. P/E for mature; EV/EBITDA for leveraged industrial; EV/Sales/EV/ARR for high-growth SaaS; P/B for banks/insurers; P/AFFO/NAV for REITs; NPV_pipeline for pre-revenue biotech; EV/EBITDAX for E&P; EV/EBITDAR for airlines; P/AUM for asset managers.

anchor_ref.description: Reference to anchor_id in source_tags.json (e.g. 'A1', 'B2'). Links scenario to the specific anchor(s) driving it.

eps_bridge_step.description: One named adjustment in the bear-bridge or bull-symmetric construction. Sum of all steps from base to scenario EPS must equal (base_eps - scenario_eps) within rounding.

label.description: Named adjustment, e.g. 'DC revenue miss -10%', 'GPM compression -200bp from mix', 'SBC headwind +$2B', 'Buyback offset -50%', 'Tax rate normalization +200bp', 'Section 174 R&D amortization headwind'

delta_eps.description: Change to base EPS in $/share, signed. Negative for bear adjustments.

layer.description: Soft = high-uncertainty assumption; Clean = directly derivable from named anchor; Strong = stressed/tail. See bear-bridge-us.md.

source_tag.description: S-level + ref tag for the assumption driving this adjustment (e.g. 'S3: NVDA FY24Q4 call guidance')

probability.description: Probability weight for this scenario. All five must sum to 1.00 ±0.01.

narrative_one_liner.description: Single-sentence narrative for the scenario, e.g. 'Hyperscaler DC capex flat YoY, Blackwell ASP +30% absorbed, AMD MI400 stays below 10% share'

narrative_long.description: Optional 2-4 sentence expansion of the scenario world

eps.description: Scenario EPS (FY+1 or FY+2 — must be consistent across all 5 rows). USD per share.

eps_period.description: Period the EPS refers to (e.g. 'FY26E', 'CY2026E', 'NTM'). Must be identical across all 5 scenarios.

multiple.description: Valuation multiple applied in this scenario (e.g. 22.0 for P/E of 22x).

target_price.description: Computed target price = eps × multiple (for P/E) or appropriate transformation per multiple_type. Verified by verify_eps_pe.py to multiply within rounding.

anchors.description: Anchor IDs (from source_tags.json) driving this scenario. The narrative must be consistent with these anchors.

strongest_anchor_s_level.description: Highest-quality S-level among this scenario's anchors. If any scenario relies on Pending, it cannot be a top probability mass.

eps_bridge.description: Named bridge from base_eps to this scenario's eps. For id='base' may be empty.

multiple_band_basis.description: Historical justification for the multiple, e.g. 'NVDA 5y P/E P5/P25/median/P75/P95 = 28/35/45/58/72; bear PE 25 = below P5 (2022 trough analog)'

current_price.description: Reference price used for return calculation. USD.

fiscal_year_end.description: Company fiscal year end, e.g. '01-31' for NVDA

base_eps.description: Base scenario EPS — anchor point for bear/bull bridges. Same as scenarios[id='base'].eps.

scenarios.description: Exactly 5 scenarios. Must include one each of strong_bear, bear, base, bull, strong_bull.

probability_sum_check.description: Sum of all 5 probabilities. Must equal 1.00 ±0.01. Computed by verify_scenario_weights.py.

conviction_tag.description: Maps probability distribution to conviction. high_bull = >50% on bull+strong_bull; moderate_bull = 35-50%; etc. source_conditional fires when any top-3 anchor is S3 or weaker.

expected_return_median.description: Σ(P × return) — probability-weighted expected return over 12 months.

expected_return_range_p10_p90.description: [P10 return, P90 return] of the discrete distribution. With 5 scenarios these usually land on scenario boundaries.

rating.description: 5-band rating per D1. Strong Buy ≥+20%; Buy +10 to +20%; Hold ±10%; Sell -10 to -20%; Strong Sell ≤-20%.

default_action.description: Implementation guidance separate from rating. A 'Buy' rating with 'hold_long' default_action is valid (e.g., already at target weight).

conditionality.description: Must match headline_conditionality in source_tags.json. Verified by verify_headline_conditionality.py.

conditional_language_pattern.description: Which conditional language pattern was applied. None only valid when conditionality='unconditional'.

headline_text.description: The exact headline sentence as it will appear in the memo, including all conditional language.

weighting_sensitivity.description: Anchor weighting impact table — required for Phase 4 IC defense. Shows how headline shifts if probability mass moves ±10pp.
